name: Pulse Event Recap
description: High-energy recap template covering venue, people, key moments, and social-ready wrap-up frames.

promptStyle.base: live event reportage, cinematic available light, layered crowd composition, expressive reactions, authentic documentary pacing
promptStyle.neg: empty scenes, flat conference room lighting, staged stock-photo posing, waxy skin smoothing

shotList: detail shot of badges or signage
